name: compass
description: Strategic-programming skills with persistent architectural memory for Claude Code and Cowork. Closes gaps the existing Superpowers plugin leaves open: socratic-interview drives planning, premise-check validates and categorizes, design-archeology reads existing code, tradeoff-matrix forces named-axis comparison, adversarial-review attacks the plan, architecture-journal manages cross-session memory, session-handoff captures structural changes, invariant-scan verifies documented invariants, complexity-budget tracks shortcuts.
